# Elixis

> Local-first AI pattern-synthesis engine for identity, brand voice, design systems, and naming.

## What it is
A Python engine + CLI/HTTP/MCP surfaces that synthesizes patterns (identity, brand voice, design systems, naming) with lens-specific outputs. Local-first.

## Install / use
git clone the repo, then `pip install -e .` (not yet on PyPI).

## Agent skill
Invoke `$elixis` in compatible agent hosts when the user needs Source Corpus ingestion, pattern synthesis, identity, brand voice, design-system direction, naming research, or Market Kit outputs. The public skill lives at `skills/elixis/SKILL.md`.

## Links
- Repository: https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/Elixis
